result.reasoning: The tool call history shows that step 2 analyzed the spreadsheet, grouping by street and city, extracting house numbers, and looking for consecutive addresses (differing by exactly 1) while excluding same-building residents (by ensuring street addresses are different). The analysis found exactly one pair of next-door neighbors: Pam Beasley at 6232 Plumeria Lane and Jim Halpert at 6233 Plumeria Lane. Thus, two employees are next-door neighbors of another employee. Applied casing rule: not applicable because the answer is numeric.
